mapper.select: SELECT * FROM client_matter WHERE law_firm_matter_id = #{lawFirmMatterId} AND deleted = false ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM client_matter WHERE access_token = #{accessToken} AND deleted = false AND status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.update: UPDATE client_matter SET status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = false
